newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. Thesis unchanged: RV/harmonic reducer and planetary-roller-screw supplier into Tesla Optimus and Unitree humanoids, gaining share vs Nabtesco. The -9.6% move since June 9 and -13.7% YTD reflect China humanoid-chain profit-taking/beta, with no negative company-specific catalyst found.

verdicts.rankRationale: Humanoid-stack lens: gear/driveline plus planetary-roller-screw exposure into Optimus/Unitree keeps it relevant to the actuation joint stack, but it is larger than the best KOID-hidden names. No fresh news since June 9 and the drawdown is price/beta, not fundamentals; hold on the thesis.
verdicts.bull: RV/harmonic reducers + PRS into Tesla Optimus & Unitree; share gains vs Nabtesco.
verdicts.neutral: Actuation purity intact; no new commercialization milestone since June 9.
verdicts.bear: $5.3B cap larger than hidden peers; humanoid timelines and China-chain beta are volatile.

verdicts.primaryRisk: Humanoid commercialization delay / mega-cap dilution of purity
